topics.title: MOQ & payment terms
subnotes: Follow up ke Budi soal MOQ

summary: Membahas onboarding supplier baru untuk Genchai: mengunci harga sebelum Jumat depan, menindaklanjuti MOQ dengan Budi, dan memutuskan payment terms minggu depan.
decisions: Lock supplier pricing before next Friday

actions.title: Follow up with Budi on MOQ

recommendations.advice: Push Budi for a firm MOQ number before committing to pricing.
